metadata.notes: Trigger: watches for new completed debit transactions (outgoing payments). Connect your Qonto account first. Filter: only debit (outgoing) + completed.
Skip zero-amount transactions and internal transfers if needed. Add more filter conditions as necessary (e.g., exclude salary payments by label).
POST to Edge Function. The function matches by vendor name + amount against open pipeline entries. If no match found, it creates a new entry with status 'beleg_fehlt'.

_setup_instructions.step_1: Import this blueprint in Make (Scenarios → Import Blueprint)
_setup_instructions.step_2: Connect your Qonto account in Module 1 (API credentials from Qonto Settings → Integrations)
_setup_instructions.step_3: Replace {{FINANCE_WEBHOOK_SECRET}} with the same secret used in the GMI scenario
_setup_instructions.step_4: Optional: Add more filters in Module 2 to exclude salary payments, internal transfers, etc.
_setup_instructions.step_5: Set schedule to every 15 minutes (or use Qonto webhook if available)
_setup_instructions.matching_logic: The Edge Function matches Qonto payments to open pipeline entries by: (1) exact vendor name + amount, (2) fuzzy vendor match + amount. If no match → creates new entry with entity='thiocyn' (correct manually in dashboard).
